text:
Created attachment 185317
v1 patch

# QA

- portlint OK
- poudriere OK in the matrix (10 & 11, vs i386 & amd64)

# commit message

net-mgmt/riemann-c-client: update 0.9.1 to 1.10.1

upstream changes:

- support micro-second timestamps now in upstream Riemann 0.2.13+
- remove test suite reliance on network connectivity to a default riemann server
